scope.label: flow-pack
scope.umbrella: FPAT Umbrella 2 — cycle-0 baseline (freeze of the Umbrella #1-era eval reports)
scope.note: Frozen copy of already-shipped eval report values, pinned for next-cycle comparison. Every number is copied programmatically from the source reports in `inputs` — never recomputed, never fetched live. Values are DATA, not gates. Absent/null means "not measured at baseline", never "zero problems". Envelope reuses lib/schema.mjs DomainReportSchema; metric sub-blocks each carry their own `source`.

officialBaseline.status: OFFICIAL — the only benchmark baseline for cycle-over-cycle comparison

historicalEnvelope.status: NON-BENCHMARK — broader communication/activity envelope only. Never compare against it. Gap decomposition (disposable #29/#30, definitional bug items, missing-label PRs #12/#14): see throughput-mismatch-analysis.md §5.

commitFormat.caveat: ERA-MIXED — pre-FPAT-convention commits count as violations (source report `inferred`). Split by era before any cycle-over-cycle comparison.

workflowReliability.caveat: NON-STATIONARY — run history grows; compare only at a pinned asOf/--until. The historical 56/14/30 tally is a stale snapshot, never a benchmark.

fpatLookingMissingFlowPack.caveat: HEURISTIC candidates only — human confirmation required; never auto-acted on.

labelFieldSync.caveat: Item-kind split (issue vs PR items) is NOT measured in the source report; planned as Umbrella 2 sub-issue 2.3 before any sync-trigger decision is evaluated.

statusCoherence.caveat: closed-not-Done is LEGAL under the designed one-directional sync — not drift.

labelGapDecisions.decision: NO RETRO-LABELING — drift is measured, not manually fixed.
labelGapDecisions.effect: The official 33/21 baseline is preserved; membership checks use the CURRENT flow-pack label by construction.

parkedDecisions.rule: If approved, date the change and compare pre/post populations separately.
If approved, date the change and compare pre/post populations separately.

parkedDecisions.status: PARKED — same no-retro-mutation stance as the label decision
parkedDecisions.rule: If approved, date the change and compare pre/post populations separately.

comparisonRules: Compare ONLY against officialBaseline (33/21). historicalEnvelope (37/25) and the stale 56/14/30 run tally are never benchmarks.
Re-run audits with the identical commands and a pinned --until; compare windowed-to-windowed at stated dates only (run history is non-stationary).
Never compare a degraded run to a live run; null/absent blocks mean "not measured", never "zero problems".
Split commit-format compliance by era before comparing — the frozen 26/33 rate mixes pre- and post-convention commits.
Always report counts alongside rates (small-n: 25 PRs, 33 issues, 5 epics).
Any approved board/label mutation must be dated in a decision log; measurements straddling it are compared pre/post separately, never pooled.
No delivery-improvement claim from any single cycle — n=1, no comparison cohort. Two identically-measured cycles are the minimum for directional claims.
Board membership is defined by the CURRENT flow-pack label (no-retro-labeling decision honored by construction).

findings: Official cycle-0 baseline frozen: 33 closed flow-pack issues / 21 merged flow-pack PRs (asOf 2026-06-07).
Planning-accuracy frozen: branch 22/25, commit 26/33 (era-mixed), epic fan-out 4/6 exactly-five, PR linkage 23/25.
Workflow-reliability frozen at --until 2026-06-07: aggregate 155/56/45/1 of 257 raw; project-sync cancel rate 45/162.
Signal-quality frozen: 2+2 heuristic label candidates; 12+1 taxonomy gaps; 45/45 cancellations superseded; gate false negatives 3/2/7.
Board-consistency frozen (live, gh-auth): 53 items, 0 field drift, 53/55 membership, 55 labeled-but-unset field values, 20 closed-not-Done (designed), 2/5 epics missing Score.
Three parked board-mutation decisions recorded with their frozen before-values.
proven: Every frozen value is copied programmatically from a shipped report named in `inputs`; traceability is checked by an offline diff (see validation).
notProven: Whether FPAT IMPROVED delivery — single baseline (n=1), no comparison cohort. This manifest enables a future comparison; it does not make one.
Why any frozen drift value arose (root causes live in the source reports as inferred/notProven, not here).
That heuristic label-coverage candidates should carry flow-pack — human confirmation required.
